problem id: 8c0f9291
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(1) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  00000000 -> 11111111
  00110101 -> 11000111
  11011011 -> 11111101
  01011000 -> 11001111
  01011111 -> 10110101
  00001101 -> 00110101
  10011001 -> 01011101
  01100011 -> 00001111
  11100101 -> 01101111

query: 11100011
predicted answer: 00001111
